name: player_season_max_ranking range year_offset takes the window MAX
description: max rank is the worst (highest) rank in the offset window -> MAX, not SUM.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT MAX(player_rankings_index.max) FROM player_rankings_index WHERE player_rankings_index.pid = player.pid AND player_rankings_index.year IN (2024,2025) AND player_rankings_index.source_id IN ('FANTASYPROS') AND player_rankings_index.ranking_type IN ('PPR_REDRAFT')) AS "max_rank_0", "player"."pos" from "player" group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
